headlines.title: Source: Microsoft plans to release an AI security tool this month using models from Anthropic, OpenAI, and itself, as a cost-effective Mythos alternative (Aaron Holmes/The Information)
At the World AI Conference, Xi Jinping touts open-source AI, pledges to help the Global South build AI capabilities, and calls unequal AI access an "injustice" (Reuters)
The agent security gap: 54% of enterprises have already had an AI agent incident, and most still let agents share credentials
Whatnot acquires Madrona-backed AI startup Shaped to boost live shopping recommendations
The code AI forgot: logcat.ai raises $2.55M to put agents to work on device operating systems
Munich robotics startup Microagi raises $55m, Germany’s largest ever seed round
Google DeepMind launched an AI biosecurity programme to fight biological threats
Sources: Z.ai is on track to achieve an annual recurring revenue of $1B, a first for a Chinese AI company, after achieving its full-year sales target in July (Bloomberg)
Google is better than Apple at playing the AI regulations game
AI-powered travel agency Fora hits unicorn status, raises $60M
Ultrahuman’s former hardware VP raises $5.5M for devices that control AI agents, not just record you
China And AI Lead Asia’s Startup Funding To Multiyear Peak In Q2
AWS EC2 and AI leader Dave Brown to exit, replaced by Amazon exec and Microsoft vet Dave Treadwell
Inside Ode with Anthropic, the startup betting AI services are the future of enterprise
Anthropic, Blackstone bet the next trillion-dollar AI business is implementation, not just models
$100 AI Music Video: Claude Fable 5 vs. GPT-5.6 Sol
LM Studio Bionic: the AI agent for open models
Sources: Apple has sent personal legal warnings to ~40 former employees who now work at OpenAI, asking them to preserve documents and meet with its lawyers (Michael Acton/Financial Times)
An Oversight Board study says top AI models are stifling political speech
AI’s fiercest rivals just agreed on one thing: regulate frontier AI now
Meta will alert parents to teens’ self-harm chats with its AI
French startup Syntetica raised $30M to recycle the nylon fashion throws away
Sources: Dave Brown, outgoing SVP of AWS Compute, AI, and Platform, will join Meta in the coming weeks; he will work on the company's data center build-out (Anissa Gardizy/Wall Street Journal)
SpaceX scrubs Starship launch after some of its engines didn't start
